'''zhanaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khansaman|khansaman]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khansaman|khansaman]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhanaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhænæzæth|zhænæzæth]] || [[word:zhænæzæj|zhænæzæj]] || [[word:zhænæzæsh|zhænæzæsh]] || [[word:zhænæzæ|zhænæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhananazath|zhananazath]] || [[word:zhananazaj|zhananazaj]] || [[word:zhananazash|zhananazash]] || [[word:zhananaza|zhananaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhanazath|zhanazath]] || [[word:zhanazaj|zhanazaj]] || [[word:zhanazash|zhanazash]] || [[word:zhanaza|zhanaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhanafzath|zhanafzath]] || [[word:zhanafzaj|zhanafzaj]] || [[word:zhanafzash|zhanafzash]] || [[word:zhanafzaf|zhanafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhanazatha|zhanazatha]] || [[word:zhanazaja|zhanazaja]] || [[word:zhanazasha|zhanazasha]] || [[word:zhanazaka|zhanazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhanazath|zhanazath]] || [[word:zhanazaj|zhanazaj]] || [[word:zhanazash|zhanazash]] || [[word:zhanaza|zhanaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhanazathal|zhanazathal]] || [[word:zhanazajal|zhanazajal]] || [[word:zhanazashal|zhanazashal]] || [[word:zhanazakal|zhanazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhanazathatha|zhanazathatha]] || [[word:zhanazajaja|zhanazajaja]] || [[word:zhanazashasha|zhanazashasha]] || [[word:zhanazaka|zhanazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhanazathan|zhanazathan]] || [[word:zhanazajan|zhanazajan]] || [[word:zhanazashan|zhanazashan]] || [[word:zhanazakan|zhanazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhanazathaoro|zhanazathaoro]] || [[word:zhanazajaoro|zhanazajaoro]] || [[word:zhanazashaoro|zhanazashaoro]] || [[word:zhanazakaoro|zhanazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
